blended.narrative: Schweitzer is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,335 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
